name: Torta Nera Con Le Noci
recipeIngredient: Egg yolks from 8 large eggs, separated
1 1/2 pounds semi-sweet chocolate (chopped and set aside)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is from the famous Bologna Bakery, Atti, Italy.
Batter:
1. Butter and line a 10-inch cake pan with paper.
2. Melt chocolate in a pan of hot water, stirring occasionally.
3. Beat butter on medium speed with half of the sugar until soft and light.
4. Add melted chocolate and egg yolks one at a time to the butter mixture.
5. Combine walnuts, flour, and stir into the butter/chocolate mixture.
6. Whip egg whites in a bowl to soft peaks. Gradually whip in the remaining sugar until stiff peaks form.
7. Stir a quarter of the egg whites into the batter gently with a spatula.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
9. Unmold and cool on a rack. Carefully remove the paper before decorating.
Syrup:
1. Combine water and sugar in a pan, bring to boil.
2. Cool and stir in rum.
Filling:
1. Heat cream and corn syrup until boiling, then remove from heat.
2. Stir in chocolate until it melts and let stand for 2 minutes.
3. Whisk butter and rum into the mixture until smooth.
4. Scrape the filling into a bowl and cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
Assemble:
1. Trim the cake to an even shape and slice horizontally into two layers.
2. Place one layer on a 10-inch cardboard circle.
3. Moisten the top of the first layer with half of the syrup using a brush.
4. Beat chocolate filling on medium speed or by hand for 1 minute until lightened.
5. Spread over the syrup-laden layer.
6. Top with the second layer and moisten the top with the remaining syrup.
7. Add half of the remaining filling on top and sides of the cake.
8. Using an Ateco #2 pastry tip (or your own made pastry bag), pipe the remaining filling in vertical lines across the width, then in opposite directions to create a lattice or window decoration with rosettes if desired.
9. Fill the center of each lattice square with a walnut half (optional).
Serve at room temperature. Store in refrigerator. Serves 12.
